description_long: This is a robust, cubic storage box with reinforced metallic edges and rivets, giving it an industrial and secure appearance. The main panels are made of dark, wood-textured material, suggesting durability and a classic look. Two sides of the box are labeled with bold stenciled text: one reads 'HEALTH' in red, and another reads 'ARMOR' in white, both enclosed in dashed-line rectangles, indicating specialized contents or functions. The top of the box is bordered by a thick metallic frame, and the wood grain is visible on all sides, enhancing its realistic texture. There are no visible handles, locks, or hinges, implying the lid may be removable or simply decorative. This box would be well-suited for placement in urban environments such as garages, warehouses, or street corners, where it could serve as a supply crate or thematic prop.
description: A sturdy, metal-reinforced wooden storage box with stenciled 'HEALTH' and 'ARMOR' labels, featuring a rugged industrial design and no visible handles or locks.
description_view_0: Front view shows a plain wood-textured panel framed by metal with rivets, no labels or markings.
description_view_1: Side view displays the 'HEALTH' label in red stenciled text on the wood panel, bordered by metal.
description_view_2: Opposite side features the 'ARMOR' label in white stenciled text, also bordered by metal.
description_view_3: Back view mirrors the front, showing a plain wood-textured panel with no labels.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: stenciled labels ('HEALTH' and 'ARMOR') on two sides
